title: Unnamed Wheel Formation
content:
The 
Unnamed Wheel Formation
 was the formation 
Wang Lin
 put up in place of the 
Realm-Sealing Formation
. It could be considered an upgraded version of his 
Life-Death, Karma, True-False Wheel Formation
.

The Unnamed Wheel Formation would function as a seal that would stop all 
Outer Realm
 cultivators from entering the 
Inner Realm
 while not restricting the entrance of 
Joss Flames
 into the Inner Realm which was the Realm-Sealing Formation biggest flaw or function.

Firstly, he called for the treasure spirits of all the treasures that were destroyed in the past 100 years of war to fuse with the formation and become eternal.

Secondly, he called for the souls of all the cultivation planets that were destroyed in the past 100 years of war to fuse with the formation and become eternal.

Thirdly, he gathered the soul fragments of the countless Outer Realm cultivators that died in the Inner Realm  and forced them to become slaves that would push the wheel forever.

Fourthly, he beseeched the resting souls of all the Inner Realm cultivators that died during the previous wars and the current war and asked them to become the formation's immortal formation spirit and be worshipped by generations of Inner Realm cultivators.
